package.name: pointcloud_voxelizer
package.description: Subscribes to a PointCloud2 stream (e.g. /hesai/pandar), the localisation pose (/pcl_pose) and the static map (/initial_map), transforms the scan into the map frame, voxel-grid downsamples it (PCL VoxelGrid), subtracts static-map voxels (Chebyshev neighbourhood lookup in an unordered_set), and publishes the remaining foreground voxels. All numeric parameters are tunable live via ros2 param set.
